headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -50.1)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 67% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 114 quotes including 90 at strong intensity - people are venting intensely today.

• The frustration score of 44.0 sits in the lower-middle range of recent activity but well above the period low.

• Both fears and optimism recovered significantly from yesterday's deeper lows, though optimism remains below average.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
